Internal compliance memo — Barrowbridge Securities plc (CRN 12849375; also recorded as C R N 1 2 8 4 9 3 7 5) — UK MAR insider list and deal control procedures.
Registered office: 14 Quayman’s Row, Dockminster, DN1 4RX; primary contact channel: compliance@barrowbridge-securities.co.uk; helpline (public): 0800 123 4567.
Ms. Eloise Faraday (Head of Corporate Development) — mobile +44 07911 864 203; e l o i s e . f a r a d a y @ barrowbridge - securities . co . uk appears in scanned PDFs due to OCR spacing.
Mr. Callum Nye (Deputy Treasurer) — UK passport no. 531234567 and NI no. A B 12 34 56 C recorded for the Insider List under UK MAR Article 18; Name: ______ Address: ______ fields in forms are placeholders only.
Banking for escrow: Meridian Trust Bank, sort code 12-34-56, account 12345678; IBAN GB00 BKMK 1234 5678 9012 34 noted in draft (checksum invalid, do not use for transfers).
Tax references (internal): UTR 80234 12345; VAT GB123456789 (placeholder, not a valid registration); internal payroll code 7M-AR-26 not tied to any government ID.
Project Moorings — proposed placing of 6–8% new ordinary shares on the Main Board of the Albion Securities Exchange; indicative price range 212–219 pence is precise and non-public.
The capex updates in the Q2 deck mirror figures already in last quarter’s published market announcement and are not MNPI; no material adverse change clause is triggered by the employment restructuring.
Action items: circulate draft insider list, lock data room, book conference rooms; product: Aurora Derivatives Engine v4.2 will be referenced in the investor materials.
Access link: https://internal.barrowsec.co.uk/memos?id=CRN12849375&case=MAR-2026-05; attachments include scanned IDs with broken line runs and smudged “UKPA 531234567”.
For HR onboarding, do not treat the public HR assistance line 0300 111 0000 as employee PII; role-only labels like “Head of HR” and “Lead Analyst” remain non-identifying.
Ms. Faraday’s notice email legal@barrowbridge-securities.co.uk and correspondence address at 14 Quayman’s Row are confirmed; private phone numbers will be redacted in any external disclosure.
Competent authority reporting will follow UK MAR and the Albion Listing Rules; price-sensitive drafts must not circulate outside the Insider List pending the dealing announcement.
